mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, b.author_name, b.created_at, b.views, b.is_required, b.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.board b ORDER BY b.is_required DESC, b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.board (id, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views, is_required, tags) VALUES (#{id}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{isRequired,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.board SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, b.author_name, b.created_at, b.views, b.is_required, b.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.board b WHERE b.is_required = 1 ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.board SET is_required = #{isRequired} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, b.author_name, b.created_at, b.views, b.is_required, b.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.board b WHERE b.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, b.author_name, b.created_at, b.views, b.is_required, b.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.board b WHERE b.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.id, b.title, b.author_id, b.author_name, b.created_at, b.views, b.is_required, b.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = b.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.board b WHERE b.tags = #{keyword} OR b.tags LIKE #{keyword} || ',%' OR b.tags LIKE '%,' || #{keyword} OR b.tags LIKE '%,' || #{keyword} || ',%' ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
